name: SQL Injection via unsanitized input to Statement.executeQuery
description: User-controlled input from HTTP request parameters flows into a SQL query string without proper parameterization. An attacker can inject arbitrary SQL, potentially reading, modifying, or deleting database contents, or executing administrative operations.
remediation: Use a PreparedStatement with parameter placeholders (?) instead of string concatenation. Pass user input through PreparedStatement.setString() or equivalent typed setter methods. Never construct SQL strings by concatenating user input.
